_provenance.method: live Kalshi GetEvent probe of 24 open MLB events spanning all 9 combo-eligible families (MLB measurement tranche, event-metadata agent): 24/24 responses carried a real boolean mutually_exclusive flag — never null. Recorded in docs/reports/2026-07-09-mlb-measurement-tranche.md ('both phase-1 blockers resolved' item 1) and docs/calibration/staged_mlb_props.md [E].

event_samples._note: one real event ticker per family, drawn from the prod RFQ tape (rfqs rowid > 13,200,000, read 2026-07-10) — examples of each family's event grammar, not necessarily the 24 probed events

_provenance.reverification: the quote path fetches event metadata LIVE per event (marketdata/metadata.py), so this fixture never feeds pricing — it is the PIN. The standing re-verification is the live probe: if a later tools/ spot check records a different flag, tests/test_mlb_event_conventions.py fires (fixture vs last-recorded mismatch) and the fixture must be re-recorded deliberately.
